mapper.select: /* PageViewHistoryMapper.selectRecentProducts */ SELECT B.ID AS id, B.PROD_NM AS prodNm, C.SYS_FILE_NM AS sysFileNm, MAX(A.CRE_TM) AS lastViewTm FROM TB_PAGE_VIEW_LOG A JOIN TB_PRODUCT B ON A.PRODUCT_ID = B.ID AND B.DEL_YN = 'N' JOIN TB_FILE_DET C ON B.REP_FILE_ID = C.FILE_ID AND C.FILE_SEQ = 1 AND C.DEL_YN = 'N' WHERE A.PRODUCT_ID > 0 AND A.GUEST_ID = #{guestId} GROUP BY A.GUEST_ID, B.ID, B.PROD_NM, C.SYS_FILE_NM ORDER BY MAX(A.CRE_TM) DESC LIMIT 10
